arts.ttl: Real Madrid's Kylian Mbappe left out of France squad as Chelsea 26-year-old recalled
arts.sum: Real Madrid's Kylian Mbappe is left out of the France squad for October's Nations League matches, but Chelsea's Christopher Nkunku is included.

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans FUME Jadon Sancho 'deserves' a place in England's squad while others back Lee Carsley's 'lovely' judgement after naming his second team for Nations League clashes
arts.sum: England fans reacted to Lee Carsley's second squad announcement with a mixture of reviews as Chelsea supporters fumed that Jadon Sancho wasn't selected, while others were impressed.

arts.ttl: 'Very important': Eidur Gudjohnsen has just praised Chelsea for one thing they did in the summer
England confirm 25-man Nations League squad as Dominic Solanke, Harry Maguire decisions made
arts.sum: England announce their 25-man squad for their upcoming Nations League matches with Greece and Finland, as Dominic Solanke returns for the first time in seven years.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer, Luis Diaz among nominees for September's Premier League Player of the Month award
arts.sum: Chelsea's Cole Palmer and Liverpool's Luis Diaz lead the Premier League's list of nominees for the Player of the Month award.
